user.title: Connect to homepool
user.description: Enter your homepool server URL and API key (from Settings → API Key in the homepool web app), e.g. https://your-domain/api. If you leave out the scheme (http:// or https://) or the /api path, we'll try adding them automatically.

error.timeout: Timed out waiting for a response from the homepool server
error.cannot_resolve_host: Could not resolve the homepool server's hostname — check the URL
error.connection_refused: Connection refused by the homepool server — check the URL and port
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the homepool server
error.no_installations: This account has no pools or spas set up yet

abort.already_configured: This homepool account is already configured
